Üsküdar University ranked in the Top Quartile (Q1) in THE Impact Rankings 2025!

Üsküdar University achieved a remarkable success in the Times Higher Education (THE) 2025 Impact Rankings by being placed in the top 25% (Q1) among 2,389 universities worldwide.

Climbed 200 places to enter the elite league

Ranked in the Top 500 in 9 out of 17 SDGs

At the top in Turkey

Succeeded in being ranked in all 17 SDGs it applied for

Recognized among the world's highest quality universities

Prof. Dr. Nevzat Tarhan | Neden Üsküdar Üniversitesi?

Manifestos

Life-Guiding Aphorisms

Üsküdar University

, founded in 2011 as a foundation university, has identified its fields of expertise as behavioral sciences and health, with the aim of producing academic work above world standards and training qualified individuals. Üsküdar University, which holds national and international accreditations and participates in student exchange programs such as Erasmus, has one of its main goals to become a “world university.”

To date, more than 24,000 students who have enrolled and studied at Üsküdar University have received both theoretical and practical education within the framework of the principle “Successful individual, successful society; happy individual, happy society,” and, thanks to an expert academic staff, have gained high-quality education and experience. At Üsküdar University, associate, undergraduate, master’s, and doctoral education are provided across 6 Faculties, 1 Vocational School of Health Services, and 5 Institutes. There are more than 125 Research Application Centers and Laboratories within the University. The number of graduates from Üsküdar University exceeds 40,000.

Building its educational philosophy on four fundamental principles—“Criticism, Libertarianism, Pluralism, and Participation”—students who choose Üsküdar University benefit throughout their education from smart campus applications, a rich library, numerous laboratories and research centers, a variety of scholarships, a Foreign Language Preparatory School, more than 400 Erasmus agreements, and the European-recognized Blue Diploma. In addition, with partner hospitals and medical centers, as well as social opportunities such as cultural events, student clubs, sports halls, TV and radio studios, students open the door not only to a good profession but also to becoming good individuals.

The university of yesterday, today, and tomorrow: Üsküdar!
